<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Approve an approval request"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/approvals/{id}/approve"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Records an approval decision. Unblocks the next step in the chain if one exists.
